g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
The information presented below is a basic description of the proposed improvements that are used in the valuation
of the property. Reliance is placed on information provided by sources deemed dependable for this analysis. It is
assumed that there are no hidden defects, and that all structural components are functional and operational, unless
otherwise noted. If questions arise regarding the integrity of the improvements or their operational components, it
may be necessary to consult additional professional resources. The sizes are based on the information provided by
the client and from public sources.
The subject property, located at 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, AB, is a multi-family, walkup property with
The improvements are comprised of 1 building, and consist of 18,117 square feet of net rentable area (NRA) as of
the valuation date. The property, reportedly built in 1981 and is to be renovated in the next 12 months, is
approximately 91.7% occupied and features 24 units in a 3-story, garden style format.
